text.title: Brainstorming Ideation (Agentic Pipeline) Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: agent pipeline finds support-inbox reply-time wins seeded by 3 personas.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Solo founder runs the pipeline against 'reduce email response time below 1h median' with 3 personas. Output is a 5-item shortlist consumed by the founder's own ops review.

section.title: Inputs
Output
